flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at LaGrange College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (566 vs 728).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at LaGrange College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (41.8% vs 47.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at LaGrange College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at LaGrange College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (60.3% → 67.2%).
